fixes.title: CloudWatch alarms for RDS
fixes.risk_reduction: Early detection of RDS CPU and connection issues; faster incident response
fixes.evidence_required_to_close: Alarms created and tested; alarm response documented
fixes.patch_content: Added observability.tf with rds_cpu and rds_connections alarms

fixes.title: VPC endpoints for S3, ECR, Logs
fixes.risk_reduction: Reduces NAT data transfer cost; improves private connectivity to AWS services
fixes.evidence_required_to_close: Endpoints deployed; NAT data transfer reduced
fixes.patch_content: Added vpc_endpoints.tf with S3 gateway, ECR API/DKR, Logs interface endpoints

fixes.title: CloudTrail S3 bucket encryption
fixes.risk_reduction: Encryption at rest for audit logs; compliance alignment

fixes.title: RDS CloudWatch logs export
fixes.risk_reduction: PostgreSQL logs in CloudWatch for troubleshooting and audit
